content: Self-Refine’s task-specific iterative output refinement and Reflexion’s dynamic self-reflective memory can be combined to create a tiered autonomous self-improvement system for LLMs: Self-Refine handles fine-grained, immediate polishing of individual outputs, while Reflexion accumulates cross-task reflective insights to rewrite the LLM agent’s implicit behavioral heuristics over time. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine’s advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision, while solving Self-Refine’s limitation of only improving one-off outputs rather than the agent’s general task performance.
